task_completion.description: The agent loaded the multispectral image into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SNAP Product Explorer pane shows 'landsat_multispectral' as an opened product.

task_completion.description: The agent calculated NDVI using the specified formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog or expression editor is visible containing the exact formula '(band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3)'.

task_completion.description: The agent created a classification band named 'management_zones' using the specified thresholds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog showing the target band name 'management_zones' and an expression applying the thresholds (e.g., < 0.2, < 0.5) to assign values 1, 2, and 3.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the product in DIMAP format to the specified projects directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product As' dialog or file explorer showing the save location as '/home/ga/snap_projects/vegetation_zones.dim'.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the product as a GeoTIFF to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file explorer showing the export location as '/home/ga/snap_exports/vegetation_zones.tif' with GeoTIFF format selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP GUI to process the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SNAP graphical interface (menus, dialogs, Band Maths) rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine SNAP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP application window is visible, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to create mock output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to create the .dim or .tif files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The agent must use the exact formula (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3) for NDVI calculation. The classification thresholds are 0.2 and 0.5. The expected output files are /home/ga/snap_projects/vegetation_zones.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/vegetation_zones.tif.
